commands.cmd:
pid=4242
if [ "$pid" -le 0 ]; then
  pat=''
  [ -n "$pat" ] || exit 1
  pid=$(pgrep -f -- "$pat" 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
  [ -n "$pid" ] || exit 1
fi
raw=$(jcmd "$pid" Thread.print) || exit 1
out=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | awk '
  /^"/ { total++ }
  /java.lang.Thread.State: BLOCKED/ { blocked++ }
  END { printf "%d %d", total+0, blocked+0 }')
total=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '{print $1}')
blocked=$(printf '%s' "$out" | awk '{print $2}')
[ -n "$total" ] || exit 1
[ "$total" -gt 0 ] || exit 1
printf '{"thread_total":%s,"blocked_total":%s}' "$total" "$blocked"
